description: The Gaussian Splat Quality Settings component is used to control the quality of Gaussian Splats in a world.

fields.QualityPreset: The preset to use for quality of Gaussian splats.
fields.MinLocalQuality: The preset to use for the minimum quality of Gaussian splats.
fields.SortMegaOperationsPerCamera: The amount of sorting to do in different cameras rendering Gaussian splats.
